rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions SORE as generalizing/nesting Gaussian-copula joint modeling and reports simulation/applications comparing SORE against “copula/JCM approaches,” indicating substantive methodological linkage rather than a passing mention. The cited paper is a core IV-free Gaussian-copula endogeneity method (with fixed effects/correlated regressors), which is a plausible direct foundation/comparison point for the citing method.
